title: Tala Bamboo Skewers, 25.5cm Long

description: From the manufacturer Tala Every product within our Tala ranges are designed for the Beginner and the expert to use with ease, With many items produced in choices of materials, price and style to ensure we provide what you are looking for Bamboo Skewers and Cocktail Sticks Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,082 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,082 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,082 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,082 4.4 out of 5 stars 376 Price — no data £4.19 £ 4 . 19 — no data £3.73 £ 3 . 73 — no data Length 8cm 8cm 18cm 25cm 30cm Pack Size 50 200 50 100 pieces 4 pieces Material Bamboo Bamboo Bamboo Bamboo Metal Other ranges from Tala Tala Stoneware A durable, beautifully bright and co-ordinated kitchenware collection, Our Oven to Table stoneware is available in the same colourways to match our Salt and Pepper Mills and many other items across the Tala ranges. Tala Enamel The Tala Originals oven to Table cookware range is manufactured completely in England, First it is pressed in Oldham and then it is enamelled in Bingley where it is hand sprayed by a small team of specialists. Tala Originals Tala Orignals contain all of the unique and specially crafted items that Tala is known for, Each product is made for the beauty and efficiency, to be both practical and decorative. Tala Performance Mills Our high quality performance mills are great for grind performance which strips the Salt and Peppercorns rather than crushing which releases maximum aroma and flavour with each grind. Tala Push & Push The Tala Push and Push has a unique locking system - Just click the lid twice to lock, To release just press the two tabs on the side. Tala Stainless Steel Tools High Quality Stainless Steel tools and gadgets for all your kitchen needs. Tala Icing Tala is one of the oldest and best loved kitchenware brands. A trusted supplier of baking and cake decorating equipment since 1899. Tala Performance Bakeware Tala Performance Bakeware is one of the best non-stick kitchenware available on the consumer market.
